metadata.title: Wizard Step Refactor — Split Stage 1 into Separate Steps

story.iWant: the wizard steps broken into focused, single-purpose screens (Details, Codebase, References)
story.soThat: each step is less overwhelming and I can skip sections that don't apply to my ticket

tasks.task: Refactor generation-wizard.store.ts stage management Replace numeric currentStage (1-4) with named stage enum: details, reproduce, codebase, references, options, generate Add getStageOrder() helper returning ordered stages based on ticket type Add nextStage() and prevStage() navigation actions using the stage order Update snapshot persistence to use named stages (backward-compatible: map old numeric stages) Update goBackToInput → goToStage('details'), goToReproSteps → goToStage('reproduce'), etc.

Create DetailsStep component Extract Type selector, Priority selector, Folder selector, Description input from Stage1Input Create client/src/tickets/components/wizard/DetailsStep.tsx Validation: type required, description >= 2 words Footer: [Next →] button right-aligned

Create CodebaseStep component Extract RepositoryToggle, RepoSelector, BranchSelector from Stage1Input Create client/src/tickets/components/wizard/CodebaseStep.tsx Repository toggle checked by default if GitHub connected When unchecked: show "You can create tickets without a repository" message Footer: [← Back] left, [Next →] right

Create ReferencesStep component Extract file upload zone and design links from Stage1Input Create client/src/tickets/components/wizard/ReferencesStep.tsx "No references? Skip to next step →" subtle link Footer: [← Back] left, [Next →] right

Update StageIndicator for new flow Accept stage names instead of numeric indices Render correct labels: Details, Reproduce (bug only), Codebase, References, Options, Generate 5 circles for non-bug, 6 circles for bug

Update GenerationWizard.tsx routing Replace stage number switch with named stage routing Render DetailsStep, CodebaseStep, ReferencesStep, Stage2ReproSteps, GenerationOptionsStep, DraftStage Ensure loading overlay and recovery banner still work
Remove or deprecate Stage1Input Verify all functionality covered by new step components Remove Stage1Input.tsx or mark deprecated Update any imports referencing Stage1Input

Snapshot backward compatibility Migration logic: if snapshot has numeric currentStage, map to named stage Test: old snapshot with currentStage: 1 → restores to 'details' Test: old snapshot with currentStage: 2 on bug type → restores to 'reproduce'

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Given a non-bug ticket When the user starts the wizard Then the flow is: Details → Codebase → References → Options → Generate (5 steps)
Given a bug ticket When the user starts the wizard Then the flow is: Details → Reproduce → Codebase → References → Options → Generate (6 steps)

Given the user is on the Details step When it renders Then it shows only: Type dropdown, Priority dropdown, Folder dropdown (if folders exist), and Description markdown input — no repository or file upload sections

Given the user is on the Codebase step When it renders Then it shows the repository toggle, repository selector, branch selector, and info box — matching the existing RepositoryToggle + repo/branch UI from Stage1Input
Given the user is on the References step When it renders Then it shows file attachments upload zone and design links input — matching the existing "Reference Materials" tab content from Stage1Input
Given any step When the user clicks Back Then they return to the previous step; when they click Next Then they advance to the next step
Given the StageIndicator When it renders Then it shows the correct number of steps (5 or 6) with labels matching the new flow, completed steps show checkmarks, current step is highlighted
Given the user has a saved snapshot from a previous session When they resume Then the wizard restores to the correct step in the new flow without data loss
Given the existing Stage1Input component When the refactor is complete Then it is decomposed into DetailsStep, CodebaseStep, and ReferencesStep — each self-contained and independently testable

doc.title: Epic 14: Optional Wireframe & API Generation
doc.snippet: Defines the generation options step and wizard store modifications. Story 14.5 extends this by refactoring the wizard step structure.

doc.title: Wizard Step Refactor Wireframes
doc.snippet: 7-screen wireframe (4 desktop + 3 mobile) showing Details, Codebase, References, and Reproduce steps with stage indicators.

file.reason: Main wizard orchestrator — stage routing logic (lines 127-184) must be rewritten from numeric stages to named stage enum routing
Central state management — currentStage (numeric 1-4) must become named enum; navigation actions must use stage order; snapshot persistence must handle backward compatibility
Monolithic input step to be decomposed into DetailsStep (type/priority/folder/description), CodebaseStep (repo toggle/selector/branch), ReferencesStep (file upload/design links)
Stage labels and circles — must support 5-6 steps with named labels instead of 3-4 numeric stages
Checkbox + warning banner for repository inclusion — moves from Stage1Input to new CodebaseStep (reused as-is)
Drag-and-drop file upload (max 5 files, 5MB) — moves from Stage1Input to new ReferencesStep (reused as-is)
Options step (wireframes + API toggles) — unchanged but renumbered in flow. Back button label logic may need update.
Bug reproduction steps — unchanged but renumbered from Stage 2 to its named position in flow
Draft/clarification stage — unchanged, renumbered to final position
Write/preview textarea used in DetailsStep for description input
GitHub repo dropdown — used in CodebaseStep
Branch dropdown with metadata — used in CodebaseStep
Reusable toggle card — used in GenerationOptionsStep, pattern reference for new steps
Type definitions for wizard state — ReproductionStepSpec for bug flow, TechSpec for generated spec

constraints.constraint: Clean Architecture: UI renders state and triggers actions only. Business logic MUST live in Zustand store actions.
NEVER implement business logic inside React hooks or components. Hooks are lifecycle/subscription only.
UI must remain minimalistic and calm (Linear-inspired). Avoid extra visual containers.
ALL card/grid/container borders MUST use border border-[var(--border-subtle)] — never hardcoded border-white/[0.XX].
Atomic Design: new step components are Organisms (feature-level UI blocks).
Stage1Input must be fully decomposed — no partial extraction leaving dead code.
Snapshot backward compatibility: old numeric currentStage values from localStorage must map to new named stages without data loss.
analyzeRepository() SSE call should trigger from CodebaseStep (where user commits to including a repo), not from DetailsStep.
GenerationOptionsStep stays unchanged — only renumbered in the flow.

interfaces.interface: Must change to named enum type: 'details' | 'reproduce' | 'codebase' | 'references' | 'options' | 'generate'
Replace with generic goToStage(stage), nextStage(), prevStage() using getStageOrder(type)

interface.name: StageIndicator props
interface.signature: { currentStage: number, nextButton?: ReactNode, ticketType?: string }

interfaces.interface: Must accept named stages and render 5-6 step labels

interface.name: WizardSnapshot
interface.signature: localStorage key 'wizard-snapshot', 24hr TTL, includes currentStage + all input fields

interfaces.interface: Must persist named stage and include migration from numeric stages
All consumers reading currentStage must handle named enum instead of number

tests.standards: No existing frontend test files found in client/src/tickets/. Testing framework not configured for client tests. Backend uses Jest. Any new tests would use Vitest or Jest with React Testing Library given the Next.js 15 + React 19 stack.

ideas.idea: Test getStageOrder() returns correct stage sequence for feature, bug, and task types
Test nextStage() and prevStage() navigate correctly through the full flow for each type
Test snapshot migration: numeric currentStage values map to correct named stages
Test DetailsStep renders only type/priority/folder/description — no repo or upload UI
Test CodebaseStep renders repo toggle + selectors when includeRepository=true, message when false
Test ReferencesStep renders file upload zone and design links input
Test StageIndicator renders 5 steps for feature, 6 steps for bug, with correct labels
